title: 17 gummy football crowd alternate
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Raul and Meg as ordinary humans. Image 2 locks the exact wide bleacher geography. Images 3 and 4 lock the tactile scale, simple faces, and fruit-specific gummy character language for the transformed crowd. BEAT — Comedic wide continuing the world plate. Raul and Meg remain ordinary and completely unbothered at the isolated top row. Every spectator in the lower crowded rows has become a small colorful fruit-gummy character wearing a tiny team scarf or holding a tiny foam finger, all cheering wildly toward the unchanged live football game. Preserve the long empty rows separating the teens from the gummy crowd. AVOID — human crowd remaining, gummy bears, giant gummies, transformed Raul or Meg, candy football field, characters moved to top row, preschool illustration.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, or storyboard grid.
